name: vibefounderskills
description: Business strategy skills for vibecoders. Validate ideas, find customers, position your product, price it, launch it, and grow it. Built for people who can ship an app in a weekend but don't know how to get their first users.

plugins.name: ff-idea-validation
plugins.description: Validate your app idea before wasting months building the wrong thing. Keyword demand checking, idea scoring, assumption testing, and pretotype design.

plugins.name: ff-launch-acquisition
plugins.description: Get your first users after building your product. Market segmentation, channel-market fit, launch execution, outreach, and community marketing for solo founders.

plugins.name: ff-positioning
plugins.description: Position your product to stand out in crowded markets. Niche selection, value propositions (JTBD), competitive differentiation (Blue Ocean, Porter's), positioning (April Dunford), and messaging.

plugins.name: ff-customer-discovery
plugins.description: Understand who your app is actually for. Target audience identification, customer interview prep, competitor scanning, persona building, and demand signal reading for solo founders who shipped first and asked questions later.

plugins.name: ff-pricing-selling
plugins.description: Price your product and learn to sell it. Pricing model selection, monetization strategy, sales page structure, offer creation, and objection handling for founders who built something great but don't know what to charge.

plugins.name: ff-growth
plugins.description: Grow and retain users after launch. Growth loops, referral systems, email list building, retention auditing, north star metrics, and scaling assessment for solo founders who got their first users and want more.
